nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview for Avelo, an offline-first macOS accounting application. Covers features, benchmarks, build instructions, architecture layers, and requirements.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative repository instructions for developers. Defines source-of-truth order for design decisions, work selection criteria, dependency boundaries, implementation rules, verification gates, and definition of done.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guidelines covering branch naming, commit style, local developer workflow, testing expectations, and pull request requirements.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Release changelog documenting unreleased v1.1 changes, including feature implementations, bug fixes, and performance benchmark results.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build automation targets for Swift package management. Orchestrates setup, development build, testing, release bundling, validation, verification, rule audits, and benchmark runs.
nodes.languageNotes: Swift package build targets with local SwiftPM cache fallback and comprehensive rule-audit checks (net-check, R-16, R-15, R-4).

nodes.name: ReleaseVersion.env
nodes.summary: Release version configuration specifying the canonical version and build numbers (AVELO_VERSION=1.1, AVELO_BUILD=3) used by release scripts and bundle assembly.
